code_python.name: Mainframe Catacombs
code_python.lore: A subterranean labyrinth of green-glowing pipes and humming servers.

code_js.name: Neon Script Forest
code_js.lore: Towering electric trees, leaves of cyan code shimmering in the dark.

code_systems.name: Iron Bastion
code_systems.lore: Cold steel ramparts forged from compiled metal — every brick a syscall.

shell.name: The Forge
shell.lore: Smoldering anvils where one-liners are hammered into automation.

data_sql.name: Crystal Cavern
data_sql.lore: Sapphire columns of indexed crystal — each facet a query plan.

data_tabular.name: Merchant Bazaar
data_tabular.lore: Stalls of stacked ledgers — rows traded for insight.

config.name: Rune Chamber
config.lore: Walls inscribed with declarative runes — change one and reality bends.

doc_word.name: Scriptorium
doc_word.lore: Parchment-walled scriptorium where monk-scribes etch reports by candlelight.

doc_slides.name: Hall of Mirrors
doc_slides.lore: A vaulted gold hall where every mirror reflects a slide to the audience.

doc_pdf.name: Tome Vault
doc_pdf.lore: Locked vault of bound tomes — knowledge frozen between covers.

markup_md.name: Scroll Archive
markup_md.lore: Endless shelves of curling scrolls, README upon README.

web.name: Crystal Palace
web.lore: Translucent halls of styled glass — every wall a stylesheet.

image.name: Gallery of Visions
image.lore: Galleries of framed visions, each pixel a brushstroke.

mixed.name: Grand Crossroads
mixed.lore: Four roads meet under a star-vaulted dome — every craft passes through.

empty.name: Wanderer's Plain
empty.lore: Misty grasslands — a conversation that left no relic behind. A safe zone.

1.label: Town of Beginnings
1.lore: Where every adventurer awakens. The starting plaza of the floating castle.

20.label: Ruby Palace — Boss Floor
20.lore: The crimson summit. The current frontier. The boss room of right-now.
